blog.title: Ultimate Guide to Sourcing Components at SEG Plaza
blog.title_cn: 赛格广场元器件采购终极指南
blog.author: Luc Junior Denommee
blog.excerpt: Navigate the 12 floors of SEG Plaza like a pro. Floor-by-floor breakdown and negotiation tips.
blog.excerpt_cn: 像专业人士一样逛遍赛格广场12层。逐层详解及议价技巧。
blog.content: SEG Plaza is the heart of Huaqiangbei. Floors 1-3: consumer electronics and accessories. Floors 4-7: ICs, PCBs, and electronic components. Floors 8-10: specialized industrial parts. Floors 11-12: offices and B2B showrooms.
blog.content_cn: 赛格广场是华强北的核心。1-3楼：消费电子及配件。4-7楼：IC、PCB及电子元件。8-10楼：专业工业零件。11-12楼：办公室及B2B展厅。
